title: BrokerArtifactHeadRequest
description: Typed broker artifact-head request family for metadata reads by digest.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for artifact head requests.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this artifact head request.

request_id.description: Stable client-provided request identifier echoed by all responses.

digest.description: Canonical digest identity of the artifact metadata to retrieve.
